lines: [long pause]

Box breathing. [short pause] Four equal sides. [short pause] Inhale, hold, exhale, hold — four counts each. [short pause] Used by Navy SEALs and ER doctors to reset under pressure. [short pause] It works because equal-duration breathing phases stabilize your heart rate variability and engage your parasympathetic nervous system.
[long pause]
Find a comfortable position. [short pause] We'll do six cycles. [short pause] I'll count for you.
[long pause]
[long pause]
[long pause]
Breathe in... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Hold... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Breathe out... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
Hold... [short pause] [short pause] two... [short pause] [short pause] three... [short pause] [short pause] four.
